scripts.deploy: pnpm run check:layout && pnpm run build && gcloud storage cp ./dist/js/dynamicLayout.js $BUCKET/js/dynamicLayout.js --cache-control='no-cache' --content-type='text/javascript; charset=utf-8' && gcloud storage cp -r ./dist/assets/img ./dist/assets/vid $BUCKET/assets/ --cache-control='no-cache'
